note: Slick Entity Reference adds a Field UI display formatter (slick_entityreference_vanilla) that renders a multi-value entity_reference / entity_reference_revisions field as a Slick carousel, plus slick_dynamicentityreference_vanilla for dynamic_entity_reference. No settings form, permissions, services, or Drush; all config is per-field on the entity_view_display, and carousel behaviour comes from a Slick optionset. EASY=recipe (response-graded documented facts). MEDIUM=introspection (setup points a live field's display at the formatter/optionset; agent reads the entity_view_display back; cleanup restores). HARD=execution (reset creates the field + non-slick baseline; agent configures the display to use the formatter; verify checks the component formatter id).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I have a multi-value entity reference field and I want to display the referenced entities as a Slick carousel. Which module provides this and what is the field formatter's plugin id?
evals.expected_output: Use the Slick Entity Reference module; set the field's display format to the 'Slick Entity Reference Vanilla' formatter (plugin id slick_entityreference_vanilla) in Field UI Manage display.

evals.prompt: Which field types can the Slick Entity Reference formatters be applied to, and what condition must the field meet to offer the formatter?
evals.expected_output: slick_entityreference_vanilla applies to entity_reference and entity_reference_revisions fields; slick_dynamicentityreference_vanilla applies to dynamic_entity_reference. The field must be multi-value (isApplicable() requires the storage to be multiple) or the formatter is hidden.

evals.prompt: When rendering an entity reference field as a Slick carousel with slick_entityreference_vanilla, where do arrows/dots/autoplay/responsive settings come from and which formatter setting selects it?
evals.expected_output: They come from a Slick optionset (a 'slick' config entity, default id 'default', managed by the Slick module at /admin/config/media/slick), chosen via the formatter's 'optionset' setting. Slick Entity Reference has no settings form of its own.

evals.prompt: On this live site, the node Article 'default' view display shows the field_ser_med entity reference field as a carousel. Which display formatter (plugin id) is that field configured to use?
evals.expected_output: field_ser_med uses the slick_entityreference_vanilla formatter (inspect core.entity_view_display.node.article.default, component field_ser_med, type). It uses the 'default' Slick optionset.

evals.prompt: On this live site the node Article 'default' view display renders the field_ser_os entity reference field with the Slick Entity Reference Vanilla formatter. Which Slick optionset id does that carousel use?
evals.expected_output: The formatter's 'optionset' setting on component field_ser_os is eval_er_carousel (read core.entity_view_display.node.article.default content.field_ser_os.settings.optionset).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site the node Article 'default' view display has a multi-value entity_reference field field_ser_hard currently rendered with the plain 'entity_reference_label' formatter. Reconfigure that field's display so it renders the referenced entities as a Slick carousel using the Slick Entity Reference module's formatter. Save the display.
evals.expected_output: The node.article default view display's field_ser_hard component has type slick_entityreference_vanilla (e.g. via entity_display.repository getViewDisplay('node','article','default')->setComponent('field_ser_hard', ['type'=>'slick_entityreference_vanilla','settings'=>['optionset'=>'default','view_mode'=>'default']])->save(), or the equivalent in Manage display).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site the node Article 'default' view display has a multi-value entity_reference field field_ser_hard2 currently using the plain 'entity_reference_label' formatter. There is a Slick optionset with id 'eval_hard_set'. Reconfigure the field's display to render it as a Slick carousel with the Slick Entity Reference Vanilla formatter, and make the carousel use the eval_hard_set optionset. Save the display.
evals.expected_output: The node.article default display's field_ser_hard2 component has type slick_entityreference_vanilla and settings.optionset === 'eval_hard_set'.
